epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 PTSD criteria; somatic presentations common; assessment includes comorbidity screening

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low due to limited access to trauma-focused psychotherapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist diagnosis concentrated in urban centers; primary care recognition limited
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Trauma-focused psychotherapy and SSRIs when indicated; community support and counseling; tele-mental health emerging
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Stigma, low psychotherapy availability, and uneven mental health workforce
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Increasing telepsychiatry and NGO-led psychosocial support in some regions
